track_label: Synthesis (keep winning architecture, selectively incorporate proven helpers)
accepted_helper: non-string input guard: parse() raises TypeError('text must be str') (evidence: track-line-regex/final/parser.py lines 161-162 + test_type_error_for_non_string)
rejected_helpers: re-basing ParseError onto ValueError -- not objectively required; winner's Exception base + structured attributes is a stable contract
known_caveats: Self-judged synthesis loops (judge.md); objective tests are authoritative and green. Scores are provisional qualitative estimates.
maintainability capped at 4/5: per-state handlers still mutate shared _Machine instance state (documented next experiment).

Unicode-whitespace-only lines are treated as data (winner is ASCII-only for structural whitespace); this is a deliberate, now-pinned choice for an under-specified requirement -- real vendor fixtures could resolve it against ground truth.
Line/column positions are counted per Python str code point (parse() accepts an already-decoded str), not per UTF-16 unit or UTF-8 byte.
stop_reason: Exactly two synthesis Loops completed; loop-02 is champion with 97/97 tests, zero regression, and all hard gates (core_samples, objective_tests, forbidden_import_scan) passing.
